description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
New
Archived filter for the inbox & Network spaces
All settings are now searchable from the Command Bar (Cmd+K) and by description
Open a space or account in a new window by double-clicking it
Fixed & Improved
iMessage: Fixed notification images and typing indicator
iMessage: Improved send performance
Fixed Telegram reactions failing when emoji had skin tone modifiers
Fixed mentions not working for display names with underscores
Fixed reactions appearing on call messages
Fixed requests badge showing incorrect count
Fixed scheduled messages space not showing up in the sidebar
Fixed stale accounts appearing in Edit Spaces and sidebar
Added support for parsing call messages on Google Voice
Fix an error when setting up on-device Facebook connection
Renamed "Scheduled Messages" to "Send Later"
